scripts.compile-contracts: bun run shared && bun run refresh:shared-dependency && bun tsc --project tsconfig-compile.json && bun ./js/compile.js && cd .. && bun run generate:ui-contract-artifact && bun ./scripts/ensure-contract-artifacts.mts --sync-contract-freshness
scripts.gas-costs: cd .. && bun run ensure-shared-build && cd solidity && bun run check:shared-dependency && bun tsc && bun run ./js/gas-costs.js
scripts.test: bun run ensure-contract-artifacts && bun run check:shared-dependency && bun tsc && bun test --timeout 300000 ./js/tests/
